nodes.context: Canadian organized crime group in Montreal, Quebec, involved in drug trafficking, bank robbery, and other crimes.
Colombian drug cartel that partnered with the West End Gang to transport cocaine.
Montreal Mafia family; allied with West End Gang and involved in joint bank robbery.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; allied with West End Gang and part of the Consortium.
Italian organized crime group in Montreal; part of the Consortium with West End Gang and Hells Angels.
Montreal Mafia family; allied with West End Gang and involved in cocaine shipment.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; listed as ally of West End Gang in infobox.
Irish republican paramilitary group; listed as ally of West End Gang in infobox.
Canadian Irish mob organized crime group based in Montreal, Quebec, involved in drug trafficking, bank robberies, and other crimes.
Colombian drug cartel that partnered with the West End Gang to transport cocaine into Canada.
Outlaw motorcycle gang in Montreal, known to socialize and collaborate with the West End Gang.
Criminal alliance of which Shane Maloney was a key member, involved in drug trafficking.
Mexican drug cartel that Maloney helped smuggle cocaine into Ontario.
Italian organized crime group in Montreal that collaborates with the West End Gang on drug shipments.

edges.evidence_quote: Under Ross' leadership, the West End Gang formed a partnership with the Cali Cartel, transporting large quantitites of cocaine into Canada from the United States.
edges.context: West End Gang partnered with Cali Cartel to transport cocaine.

edges.evidence_quote: the theft of some $20,000 in cash from the vault of the Brockville Trust & Saving Company in Brockville on 4 May 1958 was a joint operation of the West End Gang and the Cotroni family.
edges.context: West End Gang and Cotroni family jointly committed a bank robbery.

edges.evidence_quote: The three Montreal organizations (West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, Hells Angels) make up the 'Consortium'
edges.context: West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, and Hells Angels form the Consortium to fix drug prices.

edges.evidence_quote: The three Montreal organizations (West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, Hells Angels) make up the 'Consortium'
edges.context: West End Gang, Montreal Mafia, and Hells Angels form the Consortium to fix drug prices.

edges.evidence_quote: Under Ross' leadership, the West End Gang formed a partnership with the Cali Cartel, transporting large quantitites of cocaine into Canada from the United States.
edges.context: The West End Gang partnered with the Cali Cartel to transport cocaine into Canada.

edges.evidence_quote: Led by Maloney who noticed the policeman taking the photographs, the Hells Angels and the West End Gang members proceed to beat the policeman bloody
edges.context: Members of the West End Gang and Hells Angels jointly assaulted a police officer in Mexico.

edges.evidence_quote: Maloney became a key member in the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.context: Shane Maloney, a West End Gang leader, was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Maloney worked as a member of the Wolfpack, but transferred his loyalty towards helping the Sinaloa Cartel in smuggling cocaine direct into Ontario.
edges.context: West End Gang member Maloney helped the Sinaloa Cartel smuggle cocaine into Ontario.

edges.evidence_quote: The group often collaborates with the Montreal Mafia and the Hells Angels in enormous drug shipments
edges.context: The West End Gang collaborates with the Montreal Mafia on large drug shipments.
